reviews.title: Bad management
reviews.text: The hotel is good but the management is not. We booked our room with double charge for breakfast. We have tried to explain to them the mistake but they refused to refund. What a bad management!
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you for sharing your feedback with us.
We sincerely regret to learn about your experience regarding the breakfast charge and understand how frustrating this situation must have been for you. Please accept our apologies for any inconvenience caused.
Kindly allow us to clarify that we unfortunately did not receive your request for support earlier during your stay. The request from Agoda was only forwarded to us on the day of your check-out. As a result, we were unable to review and assist you in a timely manner as we normally would, which led to the outcome not meeting your expectations.
We truly value your feedback and appreciate your understanding in this matter. Should you have any future concerns, we would always encourage you to contact us directly during your stay so we can provide immediate assistance and ensure a more seamless experience.
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and deliver a better experience in the future.
Warm regards,
Mike

reviews.title: So disappointed
reviews.text:
I booked total 3 rooms for my friends and me by Agoda. (2 King, 1 Twin).
When we arrived hotel, reception just informed us that there's no twin room ready due to I booked wrongly and it will take time to ready.
So I just re-checked my booking confirmation mail and I was book correctly.
They try to bail out and make me the person who bother someone.
Even more, after waiting and go to my room with car key, the card key doesn't work so I need to go back to 1st floor again.
Normally I stay this hotel around 5~6 day a month.
But I don't know why suddenly this hotel's service going to awful. But it's clear that I will reduce the visit for this hotel and find some other place which is not like this happening.

reviews.title: Unexpected visit at night
reviews.text:
Thanks for the service fruit, but it was really unexpected and got me embarrassed when one of your staff got into my room to place it in my room without any notice - even there wasn’t door bell ringing. He kept saying ‘sorry’ for forgetting service fruit while stepping in the room. As I remember, it was late at night; over 9pm.

reviews.positives: Lovely modern hotel in the centre of the city. The tallest building by a long way so great views. Fantastic staff throughout. Call out to Sua who oversees the restaurant and bar on the 34th floor, she was amazing. Great breakfast. And all great value!!!

reviews.title: Lễ tân và bảo bảo vệ sảnh thái độ tồi

Thân chào anh Nguyen, 
Cảm ơn Anh đã lựa chọn Melia Vinpear Thanh Hóa và đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm của mình tại khách sạn. 
Thay mặt ban quản lý khách sạn, khách sạn rất xin lỗi vì trải nghiệm của anh với khách sạn lần này đã không được như anh mong đợi. Tại Melia, chúng tôi không ngừng nỗ lực để cung cấp dịch vụ và chăm sóc tốt nhất cho khách của mình. Vì vậy, chúng tôi muốn đảm bảo rằng tất cả các nhận xét của anh đã được chuyển đến người đứng đầu bộ phận liên quan để họ biết và hành động. 
Chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được chào đón anh quay trở lại trong những dịp tiếp theo.
Trân trọng!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: My family recently had a negative experience while staying at a hotel and would like to provide feedback so the hotel can improve its services in the future. The check-in was delayed by nearly an hour, but during that time, the staff showed no proactive assistance or explanation until I had to prompt them. The reason given for the late room availability was that "the room is being cleaned," but when my family entered, the room was still not properly cleaned. Additionally, after we checked into the room, someone else was able to open the door. On the day my family arrived, I also saw many other guests waiting for check-in due to "overcapacity," but I find this explanation unconvincing. I have stayed at the hotel during peak holiday periods before, and the service at that time was still very good, with staff being much more attentive and professional. I believe the hotel should seriously reconsider its organization, staff assignment, and operational procedures to maintain the service quality it once had.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,
Trước hết, chúng tôi xin gửi lời cảm ơn đến Quý khách và gia đình vì những góp ý vô cùng chân thành nhằm cải thiện hơn nữa chất lượng dịch vụ của khách sạn.
Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi biết rằng quý khách đã gặp sự bất tiện trong quá trình nhận phòng và lưu trú.
Chúng tôi xin tiếp thu những phản hồi thẳng thắn và xác đáng của Quý khách, và sẽ nhanh chóng rà soát lại quy trình vận hành, phân công nhân sự cũng như đào tạo lại đội ngũ để tránh xảy ra các tình huống tương tự trong tương lai.
Một lần nữa, chúng tôi rất tiếc vì đã không mang đến cho Quý khách kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn như mong đợi. Rất mong sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp và phục vụ Quý khách một cách tốt hơn trong thời gian tới.

Trân trọng,
Thanh Phạm
Quản lý trải nghiệm khách hàng

reviews.title: Be Aware Of Under Table Business!
reviews.text:
I stayed here for one night on my way going to Tho Xuan airport next day from FLC Sam Son.  Hotel is located in the heart of downtown area with lot of places to go.  I like the Highland coffee and Vincom shopping center just outside next to the hotel.  Local restaurants are nearby in short walking distance. 

Note: One thing I was asked by the bellboy (Nghia) was to exchange USD to VND.

This is absolutely UNSAFE, UNPROFESSIONAL,  and UNACCEPTABLE at a 5-star hotel like this.  Strongly recommend not to get involved.
reviews.response:

Thank you for choosing Melia Vinpearl Thanh Hoa for your stay and for sharing your impressions. 
We appreciate your comments. Regarding your experience of exchange money, we will be strictly with this action and this will also be a lesson for us to improve and will make more effort to keep improving.
We would like to also thank you for your spending your time to provide us with your feedback. 
We hope that you will visit us again to verify all the improvements that we have made. 

Best Regards, 
Nguyen Thi Nguyet – Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Fully satisfying stay on 30th April 2026
reviews.text:
It was seamless right from the check-in counter itself. The staff was very cheerful even during the busy afternoon hours, quickly checked me in, and offered the room without delay as I had already passed the check-in time.

The room, linen, and bathroom were spotless and perfectly maintained. This hotel chain is known for its class across Vietnam, so naturally, everything was on point. The pool, gym, and spa all had courteous and attentive staff ready to assist with anything needed, while the cleanliness throughout the property remained exceptional.

Although I did not dine at the main restaurant, the rooftop bar offered good short meals and drinks, all prepared with attention and care. Overall, the staff attitude and service were excellent.

If you are travelling to Thanh Hoa, this is definitely a must stay inorder to recharge and explore the beautiful beaches around !

reviews.title: Vô cùng tệ
reviews.positives: Vị trí địa lý tốt, gần các khu vui chơi ăn uống mua sắm
reviews.negatives:
1. Mình book trước 1 tuần phòng này, giá là 997k giá đã giảm vì thẻ booking 14 năm sử dụng được hạng genius 2. Mình cũng hay book cho chồng mình vì anh ấy công tác ở Thanh Hoá, nhưng lúc thì qua zalo, lúc thì gọi điện, khi thì booking. Trước khi tới đã nhắn riêng là hôm nay muốn checkin sớm nhưng ks k đồng ý. Khi tới là 10h sáng, có bé nhỏ, mình đã trình bày nhưnh không được chấp thuận, 13h chiều nhân viên báo đợi 10 phút. Tuy nhiên, khách đến sau và khách vừa xong được nhân viên đón tiếp niềm nở và cho checkin trước , hoàn thành thủ tục sớm trước cả người xếp hàng trước như mình. Vô cùng bức xúc lần 1. Ks giải thích do hạng phòng hoặc phòng được dọn trước nên cho khách vào trước, tuy nhiên mình không hài lòng cách giải thích này.
 
1.Khách sạn cho khách ngoài thuê bể bơi để tập bơi nên các kình ngư bơi từ sáng đến chiều tối, lane nào cũng dài một dãy,tạo cảm giác bất tiện cho khách cư trú thực sự; bực mình lần 2

3. Khu vực tắm tráng ở tầng 7 có một vòi sen cỡ lớn, phù hợp với người lớn hoặc cháu 8 tuổi trở lên. Nhà mình hôm nay có con bé 4 tuổi, đành bế con gội đầu dưới bồn rửa tay, sau đó mình bế con, và chị lao công đã hỗ trợ dùng vòi xịt toilet để xả tóc giúp cháu . Bực mình lần 3

4. Quản lý đã lên gặp mình để xin lỗi, mình định sẽ không review nhưng đến sáng nay, ks cho bên ngoài thuê, hình như Techcombank,  tổ chức hội họp hát hò, sáng 9h  muốn nghỉ ngơi nhưng hát hò nhạc nhạc nhẽo ầm ầm như cái chợ vỡ, banh nóc nhà,  thì mình sôi máu thực sự về một khách sạn 5 sao

5. Mình đã tìm mail của Founder Phạm Nhật Vượng để phản hồi về dịch vụ mà mình đã và đang trải nghiệm

reviews.title: Exceptional! 🏩✨
reviews.text:
The high ratings for this hotel are absolutely deserved. Service was incredible. From front desk to breakfast staff (especially commendable), cleaning staff (all of whom smiled and said hello to me whenever I ran into them in the hallways), and the rooftop bar staff. Speaking of which, the bartender makes a perfect Old Fashioned and Whiskey Sour.🥃And I discovered the waiter in the bar used to work at the Capella Hanoi. No wonder the service here is so damned good!✨

My corner room was beautiful, clean, and extremely comfortable. Note the 3 different pillow types (foam, feather, hypoallergenic) and the REAL oil painting. Not a print. These little details add up to an extraordinary experience.

Breakfast was fresh and varied. Vietnamese & Western. The restaurant on 34 was also excellent.

I almost forgot! The first night I discovered the TV remote’s batteries were dead and one of the table lamp light bulbs was dim. So I asked for new batteries and lightbulb at 10pm. And guess what? Both were replaced inside of 15 minutes by smiling staff. THAT is 5-Star service. Outstanding. I will absolutely be returning. 🏩❤️

reviews.negatives: Nhân viên sảnh không được thân thiện, không chào, không hỗ trợ khách, cảm giác chỉ đứng giám sát khách, rất khó chịu, làm toàn bộ trải nghiệm ở đây mất điểm khủng khiếp.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Melia Vinpearl Hotel Thanh Hóa is one of the most comfortable places to stay when visiting Thanh Hoa. The hotel is centrally located in the city, making it very convenient to access nearby restaurants, shopping areas, and local attractions.

During my stay, the service from the staff was excellent. Everyone was very friendly, professional, and attentive. From check-in to check-out, the team made sure that guests felt welcomed and well taken care of.

The room was clean, spacious, and well designed, offering a comfortable and relaxing environment after a long day of exploring the city. The facilities in the hotel were also well maintained, which added to the overall pleasant experience.

Overall, I had a very enjoyable stay and a memorable experience. I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Thanh Hoa, whether for business or leisure, and I would definitely staying here again on my next trip.

reviews.title: Perfect for Solo Female Travelers
reviews.text:
I’ve been traveling across many cities in Vietnam (Hanoi, Ho Chi Minh City, Da Nang, Hoi An, Da Lat…) and stayed at quite a few hotels. But only a handful are places I’d love to visit again — and this hotel is one of them.

Because of the great experience I had here, I decided to book another stay at their other location in a different city for this trip.

The staff are friendly and helpful, especially the receptionist on the morning shift of October 17th (I wish I had asked her name). I truly appreciate her help.

The room is clean, the location is convenient and safe — which is a huge plus for a solo female traveler like me. I’ll definitely stay here again when I come back.

The price is a bit high, but it’s worth it.

reviews.title: More than happy
reviews.text:
I have stayed at this hotel previously and I thought it was great then.
This time I have changed my mind considerably, firstly I am a solo traveler, in my mid seventies, so travelling can be a bit daunting some times.
Thu Huong, receptionist went way above her call of duty , and without going into to much detail saved my day in my flight plans to Da Nang, it was a mistake I made unintentionally.
This lady came to my rescue, I must admit also her fellow staff members covered for her whilst she helped me as did other members of the staff.
I can not thank her and her colleagues a warm thank you enough, as I mentioned I’m a little on the elderly side and travelling alone.
Vinpearl, thank you.
You will always have my business and also of my friends.
Thank you.

reviews.title: Note to everyone when using the Agoda app.
reviews.text:
I booked 2 double rooms for 2 days. However, after checking in, the hotel informed me that the rooms were only for 1 person each and required me to pay an additional fee of 273k per room for another person. I ended up spending an extra 1 million. 
Note to everyone when booking through the Agoda app: they are very misleading when stating double rooms for 1 adult, forcing customers to pay extra for another person. They never resolve complaints for customers. 
Several guests have argued about this before, and now I am caught in it again :((
